case_title: DIAMOND WELLNESS CENTER INC. IRENE DIAMOND VS COPE, ANDREW

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAMOND WELLNESS CENTER INC. IRENE DIAMOND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COPE, ANDREW $2,265.29 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,285.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-23-2002, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT COPE, ANDREW PARTIES HAVE SETTLED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
